info.name: HomesRug API - Postman Collection
info.description: Collection for testing the HomesRug API endpoints. Replace {{base_url}} with your server base URL (e.g., http://localhost:8000 or https://your-vps.com).

body.raw:
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "style": "Persian",
  "size": "5x8 feet",
  "material": "wool",
  "colors": ["navy blue", "cream", "terracotta"],
  "description": "medallion pattern with floral border"
}

request.description: Replace :generation_id with the generation_id returned from Generate Rugs
HTML preview of generated rugs. Replace :generation_id accordingly.
Checkout directly from one of the 4 generated rug designs. Send generation_id and the selected image index (0-3).
